# app-shell

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Reusable sidebar + toolbar + miller-columns layout. Apps instantiate with their own slot set.
- Exports (web):
  - Types: `AppShellSidebarItem`, `AppShellToolbarItem`
  - Values: `AppShellLayout`, `sidebarNavItem`, `SidebarNavItem`, `SidebarPaneSection`
